headline.zh-CN: 修复波形音频偶发加载失败
headline.en: Fixes intermittent waveform audio loading failures

summary.zh-CN: 波形播放器现在会直接使用已缓存的音频数据，不再让 Wavesurfer 重新抓取浏览器内部的 blob 地址，减少偶发的 Failed to fetch 播放失败。
summary.en: The waveform player now loads cached audio data directly instead of asking Wavesurfer to fetch browser-internal blob URLs again, reducing intermittent Failed to fetch playback errors.

title.zh-CN: 减少波形播放器的 Failed to fetch 错误
title.en: Reduced Failed to fetch errors in the waveform player

description.zh-CN: 当前源音频、版本对比和下载音频都会复用同一份缓存数据；播放器会直接读取 Blob 内容，避免对 blob: 地址进行第二次 fetch。
description.en: Current source audio, version comparison, and downloads now reuse the same cached data. The player reads Blob contents directly, avoiding a second fetch of blob: URLs.
